addon.name: JTL Connector (CS-Cart)
addon.description: Direct JTL-Wawi <-> CS-Cart connector endpoint (multi-vendor aware), based on jtl/connector-core.

section.item: Enabled
Default language ISO-639-1 (e.g. en, de)
Currency ISO (e.g. EUR)
Default tax rate (percent)
Rate limit (requests/min per vendor). 0 = unlimited
CS-Cart status code for "shipped"
CS-Cart status code for "cancelled"
CS-Cart status code for paymentStatus="paid"
CS-Cart status code for orderStatus="processing"
CS-Cart status code for orderStatus="delivered"
Auto-use Product Variations add-on if active (best-effort)
Auto-create missing variation features/variants (risky; use with care)

Variation group purpose
Variations as one product (recommended)
Variations as separate products
Enable debug logging
Enable verbose logging (captures structured payload samples; may contain sensitive data)
Verbose payload max size (KB, truncated)
Verbose: redact sensitive fields in payload snippets (recommended)
Watchdog: monitor sync health and alert admins on failures
Watchdog: consecutive failures before alert
Watchdog: alert cooldown (minutes)
Watchdog: alert if no successful sync for N minutes (0=off)
Watchdog: notify email (empty = site administrator email)
Retention: request log days (0 = keep forever)
Retention: debug/verbose event days (0 = keep forever)
Retention: rate limit windows days (0 = keep forever)
Retention: payload samples days (0 = keep forever)
Payload samples: keep last N per vendor+entity
Payload samples: max size per sample (KB, truncated)
Retention: admin alerts days (0 = keep forever)
Retention: read admin alerts days (0 = keep forever)
Admin panel notifications: show alerts in backend (recommended)
Internal scheduler (traffic-based): run watchdog/pruner without cron (best-effort)
Internal scheduler: watchdog interval (seconds)
Internal scheduler: pruner interval (seconds)

Internal scheduler: run in which area
Admin only
Admin + storefront
